title: Repair or explain M8 benchmark regressions blocking closeout
summary: Investigate the repeated WM-0126 benchmark stop signs, repair real regressions without weakening baselines, or produce a reviewed explanation that preserves the benchmark policy before M8 closeout can proceed.
acceptance: Diagnoses the repeated WM-0126 blocking benchmark regressions in entity-store, m4-core-vertical-slice-long-run, map-dirty and spatial-index
Repairs product or benchmark-harness regressions without weakening benchmark baselines, thresholds or protected M0-M7 facts
If a regression is environmental or measurement-only, records reproducible evidence and reviewer-verifiable rationale without changing product readiness claims

Reruns corepack pnpm bench under the unchanged 10 percent warning / 20 percent blocking policy and records the result; M8 closeout remains blocked unless the final reviewed verdict explicitly clears the stop sign
Does not change Web demo-only, Windows controlled external test, public release, store, signing, telemetry, account, paid-service or public save-compatibility owner gates

history.details: Created after WM-0126 verified benchmark stop-sign evidence; required before WM-0127 M8 closeout readiness.
WM-0126 done; performance stop sign blocks closeout until repaired or reviewed as explained.

forbiddenPaths: telemetry account paid service or crash upload implementation
final privacy legal or store claims without owner approval
